project.name: Rightsteps Backend - Change Logs
project.description: Daily change logs and development history

changelog.summary: Complete Stripe payment integration with webhook handling and testing

changes.description: Created Vite React test app for payment testing
details: Created API service layer with authentication
Built complete payment test UI with 6-step flow
Stripe Checkout Session integration with redirect
Added conditional body parsing to skip JSON parsing for webhook route
Webhook route now receives raw body for signature verification
Fixed: express.json() was parsing body before webhook could verify signature
changes.technicalNotes: Stripe webhooks require raw body buffer for HMAC signature verification

details: Configured signing secret in environment variables

changes.description: Fixed Payment model field name mismatch
details: Payment model uses stripePaymentId/paypalPaymentId, not transactionId
changes.resolution: Updated webhook to use stripePaymentId for Stripe payments

changes.description: Added cache invalidation on subscription activation
details: Clear user_profile cache after subscription activation
Ensures users see updated subscription status immediately
changes.technicalNotes: Cache was serving stale data after webhook updated subscription

bugFixes: Webhook signature verification failing due to body parsing
Payment recording failing due to incorrect field name
Profile cache not clearing after subscription update
improvements: Added comprehensive Stripe payment test interface
Implemented automatic cache invalidation on subscription changes
Better error handling in payment flow

envUpdates: STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET - Updated with dev tunnel signing secret

changelog.summary: Tutor profile verification enhancements and cache fixes

changes.description: Added verification video field and changesRequiredFor tracking
Fixed cache.delete() to cache.del() for Redis

howToUpdate: 2. Update the date to today's date (YYYY-MM-DD)
4. Fill in the summary and changes
5. Add to the top of the 'changelog' array

entryTemplate.summary: Brief description of what was done

changes.type: feature | fix | refactor | performance | config | testing
